title: Weekly Activity Summary
subtitle: You completed 85% of your activity goals this week

content.text:
Weekly Activity Summary

This week: 24.5 hours of tracked activity
Goal: 28 hours
Completion: 85%
content.headline: Weekly Overview
content.body: Great effort this week! You logged 24.5 hours of activity against your 28-hour goal, achieving 85% completion. This is a solid performance that shows consistent engagement.

content.text:
Activity Breakdown

Exercise: 12 hours (Goal: 12)
Work: 8 hours (Goal: 9)
Leisure: 4.5 hours (Goal: 5)
content.headline: Activity Categories
content.body: You exceeded your exercise goal (12/12 hours). Work activities came close (8/9 hours). Leisure time was slightly below (4.5/5 hours). Small adjustments next week can hit all targets.

content.text:
Best Days: Wednesday & Saturday

Wednesday: 4.2 hours (Peak productivity)
Saturday: 3.8 hours (Great balance)
content.headline: Your Best Days
content.body: You performed best on Wednesday and Saturday. These days had the best balance of activities and consistent energy. Notice what was different about these days and replicate the conditions.

content.text:
Next Week Goal: 90% Completion

Add 30 min of leisure activity
Maintain current exercise level
Schedule 1 hour of work buffer time
content.headline: Next Week Plan
content.body: To reach 90% completion: add just 30 minutes of leisure activity (walks, hobbies), maintain your strong exercise routine, and schedule 1 extra hour of work time as a buffer.
content.mantra: Small improvements lead to big results
